app.title: X-Ray Bag Check
app.subtitle: Border inspection screen
app.tagline: Upload the bag X-ray, then review the highlighted areas before choosing the inspection action.
app.step_upload_hint: Use the X-ray image for the current bag.
app.step_review_hint: Check the marked boxes and listed items.
app.step_action_hint: Clear the bag or send it to manual inspection.
app.demo_hint: Selected training images with matching verified labels.

upload.error_size: Image exceeds the maximum size (10 MB)
upload.error_network: Could not reach the server. Make sure the system is running.

results.title: Check result
results.no_detections: No prohibited item is clearly visible.
results.no_detections_hint: Review the image using the approved procedure before clearing the bag.
